arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: AC Milan AGREE loan deal for Joao Felix
arts.sum: The Portugal international is set to leave Stamford Bridge before the end of Deadline Day, and Milan have now ramped up talks to sign him on a temporary deal. AC Milan have reportedly reached an agreement in principle to sign Chelsea forward Joao Felix on loan for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Milan and Chelsea Reach Preliminary Agreement for Joao Felix Loan
arts.sum: AC Milan and Chelsea have made significant progress in their negotiations for the loan transfer of Joao Felix. The two clubs have reached a preliminary agreement, bringing the Portuguese forward closer to a move to San Siro. The post Milan and Chelsea Reach Preliminary Agreement for Joao Felix Loan appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: AC Milan are close to agreeing a loan deal for Chelsea's Joao Felix.
